free_text: Anomalous neutron yields confirmed for Ba-Mo and
newly observed for Ce-Zr from spontaneous fission of
252Cf source with activity of 62 mu-Ci sandwiched
Array Gammasphere consisting of 110 coaxial HPGe
detectors with diameter of 65 mm and 80 mm long each
of which is in the middle of a 7-element bismuth
A total of 5.7E+11 g-g-g and higher fold
gamma events, and 1.9E+11 g-g-g-g and higher fold
Gamma coincident data were analyzed by the RADWARE
Data taken from tabs. 2,4,5,6 of the reference
